evals.expected_output: 读取 testcases.json，执行分类路由、增量合并、去重检测，更新 testlib 知识库（modules/、index.json、log.md、changelog/、.testlib.json）。

assertions.text: Reads testcases.json from the current change directory
assertions.script: DIR=$(find testspec/changes -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d 2>/dev/null | head -1) && test -n "$DIR" && test -f "$DIR/artifacts/testcases.json" && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Checks for review-report.md and warns if missing or has S1 issues
Writes or updates feature.json files in testspec/testlib/modules/
assertions.script: find testspec/testlib/modules -name '*.json' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Rebuilds index.json, inserts log.md entry, creates changelog JSON, and updates .testlib.json stats
assertions.script: test -f testspec/testlib/index.json && test -f testspec/testlib/log.md && test -f testspec/testlib/.testlib.json && echo PASS || echo FAIL

evals.prompt: 发布用例到知识库，但 testpoints.md 里没有命名字典。
evals.expected_output: 检测到无命名字典，使用降级路由模式，明确告知用户正在使用降级路由及其影响。

assertions.text: Detects absence of naming dictionary in testpoints.md
Falls back to degraded routing using feature field as module name
Explicitly warns user about degraded routing mode
Still completes the publish operation successfully
assertions.script: find testspec/testlib/modules -name '*.json' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Suggests adding naming dictionary for future consistency

evals.prompt: 这些用例保存下来，testlib 里已经有同模块的旧用例了。
evals.expected_output: 执行增量合并：同 ID 更新、新 ID 新增、不删除已有用例，更新交叉引用。

assertions.text: Reads existing feature.json files in the target module
assertions.script: find testspec/testlib/modules -name '*.json' 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && echo PASS || echo FAIL

assertions.text: Matches by case ID: existing IDs are updated (preserving created_at), new IDs are appended
Does not delete cases that exist in testlib but are absent from incoming data
Reports added count, updated count, and affected modules in the summary
